description: Emit a Boleta de Venta Electronica (CPE tipo 03) for B2C consumer sales. Trust level T2.
audience: Empresa emisora con RUC 20 vendiendo a consumidor final.

receptor.description: For boletas <S/700, receptor can be omitted ('Cliente Varios').

items.description: See 'cpe schema cpe.factura' for item shape.

safety: Boletas are sent via daily summary (resumen diario) the day after emission, not individually.
Use 'cpe resumen send --fecha YYYY-MM-DD' to ship the day's batch.
